mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY payDealNo DESC
, * FROM (
SELECT ioi.ord_dt AS ordDt , ipdi.deal_sttus_cd AS trtDivCd , ipai.pay_no AS payNo , ipai.ord_no AS ordNo , ipai.cust_nm AS custNm , ipdi.pay_deal_no AS payDealNo , ipdi.pay_mthd_cd AS payMethCd , ipdi.pay_amt AS payAmt , ipdi.pay_id AS payId , ipdi.pg_aprv_no AS pgAprvNo , ipdi.card_corp_cd AS cardCorpCd , ipdi.athn_cd AS cardApvNo , ipaci.cret_dt AS cnclRqtDt , ipdi.reconcile_reslt AS vrfResltCd FROM inic_ord_info ioi , inic_pay_apv_info ipai , inic_pay_deal_info ipdi , inic_pay_apv_cncl_info ipaci WHERE 1 = 1
AND ioi.ord_dt >= #{fromOrdDt}
AND ioi.ord_dt <= #{toOrdDt}
AND ioi.ord_no = #{ordNo}
AND ioi.ord_no = ipai.ord_no
AND ipai.cust_nm = #{custNm}
AND ipai.ord_no = ipdi.ord_no AND ipai.pay_no = ipdi.pay_no AND ipdi.ord_no = ipaci.pay_no(+)
AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt in ('APV_VRF_SUCCESS', 'CAN_VRF_SUCCESS')
AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt in ('LUPIN_APV_ONLY', 'LUPIN_CAN_ONLY')
AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt is null
AND ipdi.deal_sttus_cd in ('S')
AND ipdi.deal_sttus_cd in ('S') AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt in ('APV_VRF_SUCCESS')
AND ipdi.deal_sttus_cd in ('S') AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt in ('LUPIN_APV_ONLY')
AND ipdi.deal_sttus_cd in ('S') AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt IS NULL
AND ipdi.deal_sttus_cd in ('C')
AND ipdi.deal_sttus_cd in ('C') AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt in ('CAN_VRF_SUCCESS')
AND ipdi.deal_sttus_cd in ('C') AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt in ('LUPIN_CAN_ONLY')
AND ipdi.deal_sttus_cd in ('C') AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt is null
UNION ALL SELECT null AS ordDt , ipdi.deal_sttus_cd AS trtDivCd , ipdi.pay_no AS payNo , ipdi.ord_no AS ordNo , null AS custNm , ipdi.pay_deal_no AS payDealNo , ipdi.pay_mthd_cd AS payMethCd , ipdi.pay_amt AS payAmt , ipdi.pay_id AS payId , ipdi.pg_aprv_no AS pgAprvNo , ipdi.card_corp_cd AS cardCorpCd , ipdi.athn_cd AS cardApvNo , null AS cnclRqtDt , ipdi.reconcile_reslt AS vrfResltCd FROM inic_pay_deal_info ipdi WHERE 1=1 AND ord_no IS NULL
AND SUBSTR(ipdi.pay_deal_no, 2, 8) >= TO_CHAR(REPLACE(#{fromOrdDt},'-',''))
AND SUBSTR(ipdi.pay_deal_no, 2, 8) <= TO_CHAR(REPLACE(#{toOrdDt},'-','')) )

SELECT 'S' AS dealSttusCd ,ipdi.pay_amt AS payAmt ,ipdi.card_corp_cd AS cardCorpCd ,ipdi.reconcile_reslt AS reconcileReslt FROM inic_ord_info ioi , inic_pay_deal_info ipdi WHERE ioi.ord_dt >= #{fromDt} AND ioi.ord_dt <= #{toDt} AND ioi.ord_no = ipdi.ord_no AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt IN ('APV_VRF_SUCCESS', 'CAN_VRF_SUCCESS', 'LUPIN_CAN_ONLY') UNION ALL SELECT 'C' AS dealSttusCd ,ipdi.pay_amt AS payAmt ,ipdi.card_corp_cd AS cardCorpCd ,ipdi.reconcile_reslt AS reconcileReslt FROM inic_pay_apv_cncl_info ipaci , inic_pay_deal_info ipdi WHERE ipaci.cret_dt >= #{fromDt} AND ipaci.cret_dt <= #{toDt} AND ipaci.pay_no = ipdi.ord_no AND ipdi.reconcile_reslt IN ('CAN_VRF_SUCCESS')
